_comment: Illustrative RECORDED outputs, keyed by case_id, so `run.py --fixtures` is demonstrably functional. These are sample observations, not live system runs. Cases without an entry here stay UNSCORED. The PC-009 entry intentionally fails — it reflects the documented stale-memory gap (the memory layer does not yet flag age; a V2 target), so the runner shows it FAILing honestly.
